parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('code', country_code, 'name', country_name, 'count', visit_count) ORDER BY visit_count DESC), '[]'::json) FROM visitor_countries) AS countries,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM visitor_sessions WHERE last_seen > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes') AS online,
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('code', country_code, 'name', country_name)), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (country_code) country_code, country_name FROM visitor_sessions WHERE last_seen > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND country_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY country_code, last_seen DESC) t) AS online_countries,
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('city', city_name, 'lat', lat, 'lng', lng, 'count', visit_count) ORDER BY visit_count DESC), '[]'::json) FROM visitor_cities WHERE lat IS NOT NULL AND lng IS NOT NULL) AS cities
